mapper.select: select apt_cmplex_no, apt_cmplex_nm, bjd_cd, sido_nm, sigungu_nm, emd_nm, unit_cnt, bld_yr, cnsco_nm, img_file_no, rprsnt_img_file_no, heat_ty, pkg_cnt, max_floor, free_pkg_cnt, dong_cnt, dorojuso, cc_cnt from apt_complex where apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE APT_COMPLEX SET APT_CMPLEX_NM = #{aptCmplexNm}, BJD_CD = #{bjdCd}, SIDO_NM = #{sidoNm}, SIGUNGU_NM = #{sigunguNm}, EMD_NM = #{emdNm}, UNIT_CNT = #{unitCnt}, BLD_YR = #{bldYr}, CNSCO_NM = #{cnscoNm}, IMG_FILE_NO = #{imgFileNo}, HEAT_TY = #{heatTy}, PKG_CNT = #{pkgCnt}, MAX_FLOOR = #{maxFloor}, FREE_PKG_CNT = #{freePkgCnt}, DONG_CNT = #{dongCnt}, DOROJUSO = #{dorojuso}, CC_CNT = #{ccCnt} WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
mapper.select: SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, APT_CMPLEX_NM AS aptCmplexNm, SIDO_NM AS sidoNm, SIGUNGU_NM AS sigunguNm, EMD_NM AS emdNm, DOROJUSO AS dorojuso, UNIT_CNT AS unitCnt, DONG_CNT AS dongCnt, BLD_YR AS bldYr FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
SELECT DISTINCT SIDO_NM FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE SIDO_NM IS NOT NULL ORDER BY SIDO_NM

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE SIDO_NM = #{sidoNm}
AND ( APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR DOROJUSO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT apt_cmplex_no , apt_cmplex_nm , bjd_cd , sido_nm , sigungu_nm , emd_nm , lat_val , lon_val , unit_cnt , bld_yr , cnsco_nm , img_file_no , rprsnt_img_file_no , heat_ty , pkg_cnt , max_floor , free_pkg_cnt , dong_cnt , dorojuso , cc_cnt FROM apt_complex WHERE apt_cmplex_no = (SELECT apt_cmplex_no FROM mgmt_office WHERE mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo})

SELECT D.HO_NO, D.DONG_NO,
U.DONG_NM,
D.FLOOR, D.HO,
D.HO_TY_NO,
T.TY_NM,
D.HO_STTS_CD,
D.IMAGE_NO, D.PANO_IMAGE_NO
FROM APT_DETAIL D
JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_HO_TY T ON D.HO_TY_NO = T.HO_TY_NO
WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND D.HO_STTS_CD != 'STRUCT_REMOVED'
ORDER BY U.DONG_NM ASC, D.FLOOR DESC, D.HO ASC

SELECT /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.main.mapper.IAptComplexMapper.selectAllHoByDong*/ HO_NO , DONG_NO , FLOOR , HO , HO_STTS_CD , HO_TY_NO FROM APT_DETAIL WHERE DONG_NO = #{dongNo}
ORDER BY FLOOR ASC, HO ASC

SELECT HT.HO_TY_NO, HT.TY_NM, HT.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE, HT.ROOM_CNT, HT.BATHROOM_CNT, HT.IMAGE_FILE_NO,
COUNT(AD.HO_NO) AS HOUSEHOLD_CNT
FROM APT_HO_TY HT
LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_TY_NO = HT.HO_TY_NO
WHERE HT.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
GROUP BY HT.HO_TY_NO, HT.TY_NM, HT.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE, HT.ROOM_CNT, HT.BATHROOM_CNT, HT.IMAGE_FILE_NO
ORDER BY HT.TY_NM
